description: Metric-specific external benchmark gaps. Fixture loading and execution remain strict; only the named metric mismatch is reported as expected unresolved. A named metric that passes, is missing, or belongs to a missing fixture is a stale-entry failure. Paths are relative to tests/golden/data/.

metrics.reason: The Bloomberg proprietary callable-tree option value cannot be reconciled by widening the source-backed tolerance.
metrics.evidence: The corrected straight-bond decomposition leaves Finstack option value at -18155.735406 versus Bloomberg -19800.00, an 8.3% proprietary-tree model gap, while OAS remains within the established 3bp convention tolerance.
